blended.narrative: Revelstoke Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,110 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
